project_name: مخيم العائدين (Camp of the Returnees) Admin Dashboard

global_rules.css_utilities: CRITICAL: Use logical properties ONLY: ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*, text-start, text-end, rounded-s-*, border-e-*. DO NOT use pl-, pr-, ml-, mr-, text-left, text-right.
global_rules.testing: All interactive/informational elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-cairo font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-cairo font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-800
hierarchy.small_label: text-xs font-tajawal font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-slate-500

layout_spacing.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
layout_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. Internal card padding should be p-6 or p-8 to prevent collision.

components.button: Rounded-xl font-tajawal font-bold transition-all duration-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50
components.inputs: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border-slate-200 rounded-xl focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 transition-all font-tajawal text-slate-900
components.table: Use solid surfaces for tables to ensure readability. bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden. Table headers in font-cairo.
components.badges: Inline flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-tajawal font-medium

animations.entrance: Use framer-motion for staggering list items and fade-up on page load. Initial: opacity-0 translate-y-4, Animate: opacity-100 translate-y-0.

icons.rules: Ensure directional icons (arrows, chevrons) are flipped for RTL using transform rotate-180 or use Lucide's RTL-aware icons if available.

login_background.description: Abstract purple/pink/blue gradient soft wave - use with an overlay of bg-blue-900/10 for the login screen background.

empty_state_landscape.description: Hope nature landscape sunrise - use as a visual anchor in empty states or onboarding modals, masked with rounded corners.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React dashboard using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. The files are .js, not .tsx.
CRITICAL: Use ONLY Tailwind's logical properties for spacing and alignment (e.g. ps-4, me-2, text-start, text-end, border-s). Avoid pl-4, mr-2, text-left, etc. so the RTL layout remains perfect.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' effect on the main layout wrapper and major cards (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/60 shadow-sm).
For complex data-heavy components like the Families Table or Aid Distribution Matrix, use SOLID backgrounds (bg-white) to prevent visual noise, layered on top of the glassy app background.

Do NOT hardcode aid fields or family fields. The requirement specifically says 'user-defined custom fields' and 'user defines aid categories manually'. You MUST build dynamic form builders/handlers for these.
Incorporate an Excel import/export capability (e.g. using xlsx library).
Integrate Firebase for the database. Follow standard secure initialization patterns.
Always add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, tabs, and interactive elements.
Use 'Cairo' font for headings and 'Tajawal' for body text. Update tailwind.config.js to include these fonts.
